pi_items.source: Searched GCompris documentation, release notes, GitHub repository, and news archive. GCompris has geography activities with maps for Asia (East, Southeast, South, Central, Western), Central America, Oceania, Scotland, Australia, and India. South America is not documented in official GCompris sources. https://gcompris.net/newsall-en.html shows multiple region additions but no South America.
Confirmed in task.json description (line 19): 'Drag and drop at least 4 countries to their correct positions' and in verifier.py (lines 156-161) where it checks for 'at_least_4_placed'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving a screenshot to /home/ga/geography_result.png (verified path). The agent must place a minimum of 4 countries on a map (verified requirement). However, the target map is claimed to be 'South America', which cannot be verified in official GCompris documentation. GCompris documentation confirms geography activities with country placement exist, with maps added for Asian regions, Australia, India, Central America, Oceania, and Scotland, but South America is not explicitly documented as an available map in any official release notes or project documentation accessed. The task is designed as a synthetic interactive task using real GCompris educational software with a specific map target.
